name: pokt-mcp
description: AI & Agents — MCP integrations for Pocket Network RPC, natural language queries, and wallet connect/send

scripts.build: npm run build -w @pokt-mcp/shared && npm run build -w @pokt-mcp/pocket-client && npm run build -w @pokt-mcp/tx-builder && npm run build -w @pokt-mcp/nl-rpc && npm run build -w @pokt-mcp/wallet-bridge && npm run build -w @pokt-mcp/agent-orchestrator && npm run build -w @pokt-mcp/server && npm run build -w @pokt-mcp/api && npm run build -w @pokt-mcp/web
scripts.dev:all: npm run dev & npm run dev:web
